en: Macro Land, where the Black Hole\rArmy's iron fist has crushed\rall opposition. Elsewhere,\rtheir grip is tightening...
Hawke! Come to me.\f
By your command, \emy lord Sturm.\f
How goes the Macro Land invasion?\f
Excellent, my lord. The other COs\rhave just completed their operations.\f
Our objective is clear, \eis it not?\f
To establish a base of Black Hole\roperations here on Wars World.\f
Yes.\fRecently, I instigated a great\rconflict between the countries here.\fI sought to conquer them all amidst\rthe unrest.\e\e I failed.\f
That was in Cosmo Land,\e\rwas it not, my lord?\f
I will not make the same mistakes\ragain.\fThis time, I will have a base\e\rand invade at my leisure.\fTo that end, \eI need materials\rand money...\f
Do not worry, my lord. \eThe COs\rhave been given their orders.\fThey will transport all that you\rdesire from the lands they seize.\f
Do not fail me.\f
Never, my lord.\f
Take out Black Hole's troops!
Black Hole is closing in!\rCan I hold the bridge?
Armies on both sides. An ocean in\rthe middle. Let the hostilities begin!
Enemy planes attack from the sea!\rCan the ground forces repel them?
Enemies at sea and on land.\rOutwit them and capture the HQ!
Enemy cannons!\rCan they be destroyed?
The enemy lab in the mountains must\rbe captured!
At last! The enemy stronghold!\rCan we win back our country?
Black Hole is closing in!\rCan I hold the bridge?
Armies on both sides. A river in\rthe middle. Let the hostilities begin!
Enemy cannons!\rCan they be destroyed?
Cross the mountains and\rdestroy Lash's laboratory!
With no ground forces, destroy all air\rand naval units!
Avoid the cannon fire and rescue the\rallied POWs.
The enemy lab in the mountains must\rbe captured!
At last! The enemy stronghold!\rCan we win back our country?
Don't lose the missile silos! Secure\rthem and launch!
The enemy stronghold looms ahead.\rHow will Sonja capture it?
On this quiet beach, the battle is\rjoined...
Kanbei goes to reclaim a town.\rThe enemy's new weapon awaits.
Sonja vs. Lash...\rA meeting of minds!
A peace offering? What does\rBlack Hole really want?
The enemy lab uncovered.\rWho is the unexpected ally?
The final battle is at hand!\rDestroy the factory pipe!
What was found in Olaf's hometown?
Enemy Md tank assault! Can you\rstop their charge?
Reclaim the land Lash stole!
Prevent the foe from firing the\rgiant missile!
The enemy bombards Colin! Can he\rhold until reinforcements arrive?
Three cannons waiting. How can I\rcross those woods?
Capture the enemy lab before your\rfoe can destroy it!
The final battle is at hand!\rDestroy the factory pipe!
Where did that sea fortress come\rfrom? Crush it!
Drake is swept up in Hawke's\rassault. Will he survive?
The enemy's battleships have come\rin for repairs. Can they be sunk?
Sami's been trapped by Adder!\rSave her!
It's Drake's peerless navy vs.\rHawke's air force. Who will win?
The enemy marches in along the\rvolcano. Can they be stopped?
Capture the enemy lab and seize the\rplans for their new weapon!
The final battle is at hand!\rDestroy the pipe to the factory!
Attack the Black Hole citadel!
The final conflict! Stop the\renemy's missile from launching!
Hey! \eWhy aren't the Orange Star\rlines broken?!?\f
They're...\e They're stronger than we\rhad anticipated...\f
I don't want excuses!\e\e\rI want victory!\f
More trouble, sir!\fWe have reports of a new Orange\rStar CO arriving...\f
Lord Flak, \eif we continue,\e we're\ronly going to take more casualties.\f
Nothing else to do.\e\e\rUse the troops we've got left.\fThis Orange Star CO...\e\rWhat's he like?\f
Whew! \eOK, we've taken care of the\rmajority of Black Hole's forces here.\fThis Black Hole Army is proving to be\rquite dangerous.\f
Commander! \eWe've located the\rremaining enemy units.\fWe're preparing to launch pursuit.\f
Understood.\e\e\rI'll take it from here!\f
Nell!\e\e What's the matter!?\rAre you OK?\f
Oh, \eAndy!\e\e\rSorry for the sudden call.\f
Where are the bad guys?\f
Settle down.\e\e\rI've wiped out most of the enemy.\f
Oh...\e\e I was hoping I'd get\ra chance to show off for you.\f

Don't be foolish, Andy!\e\e\rThis is no training exercise!\fYou might be a mechanical wizard, but\ryou still need practice with soldiers.\fI don't think you're as combat\rready as you'd like to believe.\fYou can take over for me,\fbut I'm going to give you instructions\ras you go,\e and I want you to listen!\f
Yes, ma'am!\e\e\rLet's get started!\f
The orange units are under\ryour command.\fYour enemies are those black units in\rthe top-right corner of the map.\f
Your goal is simple: reclaim our land.\fDo that by capturing the enemy\rHQ \eor by defeating all enemy units.\fMove out, and be careful not to let\rthe enemy defeat your troops.\f
OK! \e\eI'm ready to go!\f
Rushing into battle only to get\rbeaten\e wins us nothing.\fLet's review some basic troop\rdeployment first.\f
First, \euse this cursor to give orders.\fMove it with the + Control Pad.\e\e\rHere, \etry giving orders to a unit.\fMove the cursor onto a unit\e\rand press the A Button.\f
You chose End. \eThis will end your\rturn and let your enemy begin moving.\fYou should only pick this when you've\rfinished giving orders to all units.\fTry giving orders to a unit now.\f
That's an infantry unit.\fThey have low firepower, \ebut\rthey're essential to combat.\fNow, \edo you remember what our\rgoals are on this map?\f
You bet! \eGet rid of all the bad\rguys, \eor capture their HQ!\f
You did remember! \eWell done!\fNow, \e\ethis is important: \e\eonly foot\rsoldiers can capture properties.\fOf course, infantry units are a type\rof foot soldier.\f
That's right!\fIf I don't have any foot soldiers,\e\rI can't capture anything.\f
Right! Now, don't forget: you can only\rcapture enemy and neutral properties.\fThe Capture command appears when\ryou move an infantry unit onto these.\f

OK, \elet's move a unit.\fDid you notice how some of the spaces\raround that unit changed color?\fThat's the unit's movement range.\fWhen you've finished moving a unit,\r\ethe Command menu will appear.\fSelect Wait if you have no further\rorders for that unit.\f
That's an APC unit.\e\rAPCs have no attack capabilities.\f
Oh, weak!\f
Weak in combat, perhaps, but they're\rincredibly useful.\fThey can load and transport infantry\runits\e and supply your units.\f
Load, huh?\e\rI don't get it, \ebut it sounds useful!\f

If you move infantry units onto\rAPCs,\e the Load command appears.\fThen use the Drop command to unload\rthose units. Transporting troops\fin APCs like this gets your infantry\rwhere they need to be in a hurry!\f
I get it... \eInfantry units can move 3\rspaces, \ebut APCs can move 6!\fI've gotta give that a try!\f
Be careful: \eunits that have been\rdropped can only be ordered to Wait.\fAlso, \eyou can only drop units onto\rterrain they normally can traverse.\f
If I dropped infantry in the sea, they\e\rmight drown, huh? \eOK. \eI won't forget.\fBy the way, Nell, \ewhat's "Supply"?\f

Units lose both fuel and primary-\rweapon ammo as they fight.\fWhen they run out of primary-weapon\rammo, your units use weaker attacks.\fWhen they run out of gas, your\runits can't move.\fAPCs can supply fuel and rounds to\runits in adjacent spaces.\fAPCs automatically supply any nearby\runits at the start of each turn.\fHowever, you can use the Supply\rcommand if you need supplies quickly.\f
OK, \esooooo...\eAPCs are used to help\rout other units. \e\eGot it!\f

OK, \enow let's move a unit.\fDo you see how some spaces around\rthat unit have changed color?\fThat's the unit's movement range.\fWhen you've finished moving a unit,\r\ethe Command menu will appear.\fSelect Wait if you have no further\rorders for that unit.\f

All right, now take a close look at\rmovement range.\fDo you see how the APC can't travel\rin the mountains?\fAll units have a movement type, \eand\rthis affects their movement costs.\fAPCs move on treads, like tanks, \e\eso\rthey can't cross mountains or rivers.\fTo see intel on units, \eselect them and\rpress the R Button.\f
How do I check which units can move\rin specific types of terrain?\f
Place the cursor on the terrain, \eand\rpress the R Button for intel!\f
When you've finished deploying all of\ryour units,\e your turn's finished.\fPlace the cursor in an empty space\rand press the A Button.\fOn the Command menu, \eselect End to\rcomplete your turn.\f
That woman's tough...\e\e\rCan I win with these units?\fHah! \eThis is where the fun starts.\f
Hey, \eNell.\e We're fighting\rthe Black Hole Army, right?\f
Yes. \e\eHowever, it isn't Sturm we're\rfacing. It looks like another CO.\fI get the impression that whoever it is\rjust wants to smash things.\f
Well, he's not getting away with\ranything while I'm around!\f
That's the spirit! \eI knew I could count\ron you!\f
Now,\e let me give you some instructions\ron combat.\fThe infantry under your command\rhere \eare direct-combat units.\f
Direct combat is when I move next to\ran enemy unit and attack, right?\f

That's right!\e\e You're such a quick\rstudy!\fAfter you attack, \ethe enemy will\ralways counterattack if possible.\fDamaged units lose firepower, though...\fso even if the enemy fires back,\e it's\rto your advantage to attack first.\f
OK, \eso my attack reduces the enemy's\rHP \eand its attack strength.\fThat means I take less damage! \e\eHe\rwho strikes first \ewins!\f

Damaged units will have an icon\ron them displaying their remaining HP.\fIf their HP reaches 0, \ethey'll vanish\rfrom the battle, \eso be careful!\fMove next to an opponent, \eand Fire\rwill appear in the Command menu.\fSelect Fire, \econfirm your target,\e\rand the combat will begin. \eSimple!\f
Sure is! \eI'm itching to get started!\f

You see the window on the left, right?\e\e\rThat's called the Cursor Intel window.\fThe heart icon shows HP. \eThe fuel\rtank shows remaining gas.\fIf the unit has a primary weapon,\e\rthe number of rounds left is shown.\fAs a CO, \eit's your duty to be\raware of your units' conditions.\f
Your infantry unit has begun capturing.\e\rLook at the Cursor Intel window, please.\f

The number that went down here is the\rCapture Number.\f When it reaches 0,\fthe property is captured!\fAn infantry unit with 10 HP reduces\rthe Capture number by 10 in 1 turn.\fSo, \ean undamaged infantry unit can\rcapture a property in 2 turns.\fIf the capturing unit is moved or\rdefeated before the property is\fsecured, \ethe Capture Number returns\rto its maximum, \eso be careful!\f
I understand! \eGotta protect units\rthat are capturing!\f
Correct!\fDon't forget, \euntil the property has\rbeen fully secured, you need to order\fyour units to Capture each turn.\f
The Orange Star Army is here!\e\rI order you to surrender!\f
You did it, Andy!\e\e\rThis area has been liberated!\f
Hmmm...\e\rBut\e it was kinda too easy...\f
Don't worry. \e\eI've a feeling that we're\rin for a whole slew of combat.\fToday, \ehowever,\e we celebrate\ryour victory! \e\eKeep up the good work!\f
Andy! \eWhat in the world?\e\e\rYour units are out of fuel!!!\f
I,\e um...\eI though I saw\rsomething, and...\f

Don't lie to me, young man!\e\e You were\rplaying around, wasting time and fuel!\fI am VERY disappointed!\fOpen up the Map menu \e and select\rOptions, please!\fNow choose Yield, \e and we can\rtry this over from the beginning.\f
OK... \eI won't mess up again.\f

Too bad, \ebut you've been defeated.\fI think your superior numbers made\ryou overconfident.\fRecklessly charging about means\rthe enemy can get the jump on you.\fTry moving just outside the foe's\rmovement range and waiting there.\fThat way, \ethe enemy comes to you,\rand you can fire first.\fBetter luck next time!\f
That's just a taste\rof my skill!
Commander, \eenemy troops have been\rspotted on the far side of the river.\f
Are you sure?!?\e\e\rHere? In this rural area?\f
What are your orders, ma'am?\e\e\rShould we cease ops and attack?\f
That's affirmative, soldier.\fWe can't allow the enemy a foothold\rthis deep in Orange Star territory.\f
Good assessment, Sami!\fThat's the tactical sense I expect\rfrom a special-forces commander!\f
Nell!\e\e\rWhat are you doing here?\f
Tracking down the CO who's\rinvading Orange Star, of course!\fSami, \ecan I trust you to take\rcare of this situation?\f
Yes, ma'am!\fBut if you had some advice you could\roffer,\e I'd feel much more confident.\f
I'd be happy to, Sami!\e\e\rOK, troops! \eLet's move out!\f
Lord Flak, \eour infantry has reported\rfinding Orange Star properties.\f

What?\e\e Enemy cities?\e\e\rCapturing bases is grunt work,\fbut I was told we need cash to\rfund the invasion...\fListen up! \eIf it ain't nailed\rdown,\e steal it!\fNow, \ecities, bases, or whatever,\e\rthey all got Capture Numbers of 20.\fAny infantry with an HP of 10 can\rreduce the Capture Number by 10.\fSo, that means you can secure a\rproperty in...\euh...\e2 days!\fIf you move \eor get taken out while\rcapturing, \eyou gotta start over again!\fYou got that? \eWell then, get moving!\e\rBlack Hole needs cash!!!\f
Lord Flak! \e\eOrange Star forces\rsighted on the opposite shore...\f
What?!?\e Is that all they got?!\r\eHah! \eSend out the tanks!\fTanks are powerful, and they move far.\e\e\rTanks are the best!\fOrange Star COs? \eHAH! \eI will\rcrush them! \eCrush them all!\f
Sami, \eyou already know the basics of\rtroop deployment, \e\eso...\fPlease look at the Cursor Intel\rwindow below.\f

There are some stars below the HQ\ricon, right?\fThose illustrate the level of defensive\rcover offered by this terrain.\fThe higher the defensive cover,\e\rthe less damage you take in combat.\fSo\e try choosing terrain that\rallows you to mitigate battle damage.\fIf you need terrain intel, just press\rthe R Button.\f
So that means that it's better to\rengage those tanks from the woods\frather than on the plains or roads,\rright?\f
You've got it!\e\rGo get 'em, Sami!\f
Things will only get worse if\ryou select End now.\fPlease give orders to all your\runits.\f
I'm always amazed at your ability\rto capture properties, Sami!\fThat extra speed is a useful\rCO Power to have in combat.\f
Thanks! \e\eBeing good at capturing and\rtroop transport is fine...\fbut I'm not very comfortable attacking\rwith non-infantry units.\fI guess that's something I'll\rhave to work on.\f
Yes, \ethat is important.\fHowever, \eit's vital that you utilize\ryour unique talents and develop\fyour own fighting style, too.\f
My...\e My own fighting style?\fYou're right! \eI'll do my best, ma'am!\f
That's the spirit! \eI'm counting on you!\e\rLet's get back to my explanation.\fI'd like to discuss that city\ryou've started capturing.\f
Unlike the enemy HQ, \ecapturing\rthis property won't win you the battle.\fHowever, \eall bases are vital to\rthe success of any campaign.\fCan you tell me why?\f
Um...\ebecause they provide defensive\rcover as well as funds...right?\f

Absolutely right! \eNicely done, Sami!\fYour army receives funding daily\rfrom all allied properties.\fIf you have deployment properties,\e\ruse your funds to ready new troops.\fAs you have no deployment properties,\e\ryour funds will only go toward\frepairing your units. \eStill, having lots\rof properties is never a bad thing,\fso capture as many as you can!\f

The unit you've selected is an\rartillery unit.\fIt's an indirect-combat unit that can\rfire on enemies from a distance.\fAttacking from a distance means you\rhave no fear of counterstrikes.\fHowever, \eindirect-combat units cannot\rfire on adjacent units.\fThat means that indirect-combat\runits cannot counterattack.\f
OK! \eI'll try not to expose\rthem to direct fire!\f
If you're able to do that, \eI'm sure\rthey'll treat you right!\fOne more thing, \eindirect-combat units\rcannot fire after moving.\fThey can only attack from their\rcurrent locations.\f
Understood! \e\eI'll use these units\rto lie in wait and ambush the foe.\f

Perfect!\e Now,\e do you remember how\rto check a unit's range of fire?\fPlace the cursor on a unit \eand press\rthe B Button. \eSee the lights?\fArtillery units have a range of\rfire of 2-3 spaces.\fYou can confirm this intel by selecting\rthe unit and pressing the R Button.\f\r

That's a mech unit.\e Mech units are\rstronger than infantry units.\fAs foot soldiers, \ethey can capture,\ruse transports, \eand cross mountains.\fAnd, as it says under CO on the Map\rmenu, \eyou're tops with infantry.\fInfantry under your command have\rsuperior firepower.\fThis allows them to hold their own\reven against tank units.\fBe careful not to let the enemy\rfire on you first, though.\f
Ouch! \eThat unit's been hurt.\e\rI need someplace to rest it.\f

Don't panic, Sami.\e\e\rThere's a way to help that unit out.\fUnits that have taken damage can\rrest on any allied property.\fWhile they're resting, \ethey recover\r2 HP at the start of each turn.\fPlus, \eresting units also replenish\rall of their fuel and ammo!\f
Bases also have the advantage of\rhigh terrain cover! \eSpectacular!\f
You're right!\fHowever, \eenemies receive the same\rbenefits from their bases.\fSo, \ecapturing properties is vital in\rany successful combat plan!\f
Understood!\e\rCapturing is something I excel at!\f
Grrrr!\e\rTwo women COs!\fGood country!\e\e\rI must have it!\f
It's our turn.\fMove any damaged units onto secure\rproperties and rest them.\fBe sure to continue capturing any\rbases that are not yet secure.\f
Now,\e maybe this is something\ryou've been wondering about...\f

There are some numbers displayed\rnext to your picture, right?\fThose numbers are your current\rfunds. \e\eYou have 6,000 G.\fFunds are used to deploy new troops,\e\rbut don't worry about that now.\fDepending on the unit's cost,\e some\rfunds might be needed for repairs.\fThat's it for my lessons today.\e\e\rCan I leave the rest up to you?\f
Yes, ma'am!\e\rI feel confident of victory!\f
Grrrr!\e\rNot bad...\efor a girl!\f
You're the Black Hole CO!?\e You're\rjust a thug! \eWho do you think--\f
Yap, yap, yap! \eShut your trap!\fI'm leaving \efor now...\e\e\rNext time, \eI'll put you in your place.\f
Hey!\f
He escaped...\e\e\rAnd he was so rude, too!\f
Oooh!!\e\e\rThat makes me so angry!\fIf I get the chance, I'm gonna\rrun him down!\f
I'm glad we can depend on you, Sami.\f

How disappointing.\e\rYou've been defeated.\fProtect the cities to the left of the\rbridge with mech or infantry, and\fhalt the foe's advance.\fDeploy indirect-combat units behind\ryou to lay down covering fire.\fUse the cities below to rest\ryour troops and let them recover.\fDon't forget, your infantry can\rcross rivers! That's important.\f
Understood... \eMy apologies, ma'am.\f
Sami, \eI know you won't make the same\rmistake twice. \eYou'll win next time!\f
That big thug! He won't\rget away next time!
Hey!\e Orange Star dogs!\e\e\rCan you hear me?\f
Um... Lord Flak...\e\rThe microphone?\f
Shut up!\e\e\rToo complicated!\fAnyone there?\e\e\rOr are you too scared to face me?!?\f
What's with the racket?\e\e\rYou lonely or something?\f
Hah! \eLook! A gorilla!\f
What did you say?!?\fIf anyone here's a gorilla,\e\rit's you, ape-man!\f
I'm no ape!\e\e\rI'm Flak!!!\f
Flak? \e\eWhat's that,\rsome sort of code name?\fListen up, Flak.\e\rMy name's Max.\fNow tell me what you jerks are doin'\rrampaging through our country?\f
YOUR country?\fOrange Star belongs to the Black\rHole Army now!\fYou complain, you get hurt!\f
Oh, you think so!?\e\e\rGive it your best shot!\f
Max! \eCalm down.\f
Nell?!?\f
To lose your head is to lose the fight.\e\e\rI taught you that, remember?\f
Yes, \ebut...I...\e\e\rIt's just...\f
I understand your anger, Max.\e No one\rlikes seeing his homeland ravaged.\fAll the more reason to proceed calmly\rand rationally.\fUse your head, \eand drive these\rfiends from our borders! \eOK?\f
You got it! \eLet's roll!\f
Now, Max, \eI know that you're a\rcombat veteran, but...\f
medium tanks,\f
battle copters,\f
and transport copters\f
are tough to handle if you're a\rbit rusty.\f
You deployed copters?!?\fWell, it has been a while since I've\rdealt with air units.\fBut Md tanks?!? \eC'mon, it's a tank!\e\rBigger and stronger, but still a tank!\f

OK, \eI'll give you that one.\fIn the knock-down-drag-out world of\rdirect combat, \eyou're the champ.\fWhen it comes to firing, \eair units act\rthe same as ground units.\fI'll bet that your tank expertise\rmakes you handy with B copters, too!\f
Ha ha...yeah. \eYou're probably right.\fIn a head-to-head battle, I can't\rbe beaten!\f
However, indirect combat is another\rstory, isn't it?\f
I'll admit that your power has over-\rcome that particular obstacle, though.\f
You know it! \eIndirect-combat units?\e\rWho needs 'em?!\f
I can't fault your confidence.\e\rTry not to overdo it!\f
You should never end your turn until\ryou've issued orders to all your units.\fHe who hesitates is lost!\e\e\rNever waste a day if you can help it.\f

That's a transport copter, right?\fLike APCs, T copters can carry\rinfantry and mech units.\fAnother similarity is that they lack\rweapons. \eT copters cannot fire.\fOn a map like this, \ewhere you need to\rcircle around to reach the enemy HQ,\fT copters can shorten the distance.\e\rEven seas are no obstacle.\f
Now that's useful!\f

Yes, it is! \eI'll leave it to you on\rhow best to utilize them.\fLoading and unloading with T copters\ris handled the same as with APCs.\fNot being able to drop units off in\rcertain terrain is the same, too.\fOne other thing: \eT copters can't\runload or supply troops when flying\fover seas. \eDon't forget that.\f

What you have there is a battle\rcopter. \e\eIt's a direct-combat unit.\fAir units are easy to deploy because\rtheir movement isn't limited by terrain.\fOf course, they don't receive any\rdefensive cover, either.\fB copter firepower is at least equal\rto a tank's...\fand in dogfights with other copters,\rthey're as tough as can be.\fPress the R Button for further intel.\f
All right!\e\rI'm gonna knock some heads!\f
We talked about this earlier, right?\e\rYour difficulty with indirect combat?\f
Oh...yeah...\e\e\rI thought we'd covered that.\f
Just hear me out, Max.\fTo see your units' ranges of fire,\rpress the B Button.\fIn your case, the ranges are a little\rsmall, so make sure you take a look.\f
Yeah, I know... You don't have\rto keep reminding me about it.\fBut yeah, I'll admit it:\e knowing your\rweak points is important.\f
Wow! \e\eMax, \eyou've come a long way.\e\rI didn't think I'd hear you say that.\f
Oh,\e well...\e Hey! \eIt's about time to\rshow these goons we mean business!\f
NO! \eThose copters are damaged!\e\rWhere can I repair them?\f

Sorry, Max, \ebut there's no place to\rrepair air units on this map.\fYou need an airport for that, \eand\rthere's just not one around here.\fYou're not completely helpless, though.\e\rThere's another B copter unit, right?\fWell, you can take two units of the\rsame type and join them together.\fDo this to create one unit that has\rthe combined HP of the single units.\f
Join?!?\e Making one unit out of two?\f
Uh-huh. \eTwo become one, \eand they\rcombine their HP.\fOf course, this does mean that you\rhave one less unit to work with.\fMy advice is to avoid this unless\rit's absolutely necessary.\f
Can an individual unit have more\rthan 10 HP?\f
Unfortunately, no. \e10 is the max.\fTo join, simply move one unit onto the\rother and select the Join command.\fOne more thing: \ea damaged unit\rcannot join with an undamaged unit.\f
OK! \eI got it!\f
You know, this Max guy kinda reminds\rme of me...\eexcept...\e\e\eI'm me.\fHmmm...\e This should be fun.\f
How's that, ape-man?!?\e\e\rTold you not to mess with me!\f
...\eHah!\f
Hah? \eDon't hah me!\e\e\rYou just got beaten!\f
This was just a test.\e\e\rNext time is for real.\f
Like I've never heard that before!\fI'm gonna make you regret ever\rshowing your ugly mug around here!\f
Max, or whatever you said your\rname was, \eyou're mine!\fBefore this is over, \eI'll crush\ryou like a bug. \e\eSo long.\f
Wait! \eWait, you dirtbag!\e\e\rShoot! \eHe got away!\f
Black Hole...\e\rDeplorable characters. \eAll of them.\f
You said it!\f

By the way, \ethere's something else I\rwanted to talk to you about.\fAfter the battle, you'll see some\rpoints and a rank displayed, right?\fThe points you can use in Battle Maps\rto buy things from Hachi.\fI'll explain how to get high points.\f
OK! \eI definitely want to win with\rthe highest ranking possible.\f

I thought as much!\fYou know, battling for higher rankings\ris fun when you've got free time.\fFirst, \elet me tell you what the\rscores all mean...\fSpeed is the length of time\ryou take to complete the mission.\fNext, \ePower is the number of enemy\runits you destroy.\fFinally, \eTechnique counts the\rnumber of units you lost.\fHowever, \evictory is your top priority.\e\e\rDoing silly things to earn more points\fis not acceptable!\f
Points or no points, \eI'm always at full\rthrottle! \eI won't stop!\f
NO! \eI lost...\e\e\rI'm sorry, everyone...\f

Cheer up, Max. \e\eYou'll just have to do\rbetter next time.\fThose Md tanks were the problem,\rweren't they?\fIn Md tank vs. Md tank battles,\e\reveryone takes damage.\fPlacing an Md tank unit on the bridge\rto the isle might be a way to halt\fthe enemy's advance, though.\fUsing B copters might work, too.\e\e\rMd tanks aren't great vs. copters.\fThat's because they use their weak\rsecondary weapons against air units.\fKnowing the strengths and weaknesses\rof units is vital to your success.\fOh, yes, \ethe enemy HQ is unguarded,\rright? \eTime for a T copter!\fDrop off some infantry to capture it,\rand the battle is yours!\f
What a disgrace...\e\rI won't lose again! \eI promise, Nell!\f
That's the spirit, Max!\e\rGood luck!\f
Flak, huh? Dumb name,\rtough CO.
Lord Flak,\e\rtroop deployment is complete.\f
Look what we have here.\fMax's boys...\e\e\rI'm gonna enjoy this.\f
Uh, sir...\e The unauthorized use of\rtroops for personal vendettas is...\f

Andy!\fI've got some intel on that\rmonstrosity!\fIt's called a Black Cannon.\fIt's supposed to have a huge range of\rfire. \eUse the B Button to check it out.\fThat's just a prototype, though, \eso it\rcan only fire once every 2 days.\fIt's designed to fire on the strongest\runit within range.\fI'll get back to you once I get\rsome intel on its weak points.\f

With a vision range of 5, \erecon units\rare indispensable in Fog of War.\fThey also have extended movement\rranges and can take on infantry\fand mech units with decent success.\e\rThey're handy units to have around.\f
I can't see into those woods!\e\rWhat's going on?\f

You can't see into woods even if\rthey're within your vision range.\fThe only way to tell if an enemy unit\ris hiding there is to move to the\fspace next to the woods.\e\rThe same goes for the enemy, too.\fIf you conceal a unit in the woods,\e\rit won't be spotted unless the enemy\fgets right next to it.\f
So, battling in Fog of War's like\ra big game of hide-and-seek!\f

You know, Andy, \eyou're right. \eIt is.\fYou'll also have to watch out for\rambushes in Fog of War.\fThese occur when you try to move to\ror through a space occupied by an\fenemy unit.\e If this happens, you'll\rstop moving,\e and you won't be able\fto move until the next day.\fThere are lots of ambushes in woods,\e\rso be extra careful.\f
Got it!\f
You know how to win, right?\fDestroy all the enemy units, \eor\rcapture the enemy HQ.\fThe foe looks like they're preparing\rto flee, \eso you'd better hurry!\f
Infantry and mech units can do more\rthan just capture, you know.\fThey can increase their vision range\rby climbing mountains!\fSince we have some mountains so\rclose by, you should test it out.\f
Hurry up!\e\e\rWe gotta stop their advance here.\f
Yes, sir.\f
Andy, \eI have some soldiers out\rreconnoitering the field.\f
According to my reports, \ethere's an\rindirect-combat unit hiding in one of\fthe 3 woods at the top of the map.\f
Really?\e\rOK, I got it!\e I'll advance carefully.\fThanks a bunch, Sami!\f
How's the Fog of War?\f
It really slows things down.\fStrong units are useless if they\rcan't see anything.\fIt's tough if you don't use\rrecon units well.\f

Understanding that's half the battle!\e\rThe rest comes with experience.\fOh yes, \ethere's something I forgot to\rtell you yesterday.\fIn addition to woods, \ethere's\rone other terrain type that\fconceals units until you're next to it.\f
It's reefs. \eLike this one here.\fIf you're looking to take out all\renemy units, \edon't forget to look here!\f
I have some new intel, Andy.\fSomewhere in the woods near the lab\ris another indirect-combat unit.\fIf you suddenly come under fire,\e\rcheck the woods first.\f
Understood!\fCouldn't do this without you, Sami!\e\rI'll try and hold up my end!\f
Lord Flak!\e\rThe preparations are complete!\fWe only need to hold off Orange\rStar for the rest of the day.\fIf we can do that, \ewe'll be able to\rdestroy the new weapon plans!\f
We gotta sacrifice this lab.\fI don't like it,\e but we\rdon't have a choice.\f
Lord Flak... \e\eThe new weapons plans\rhave been stolen...\f
.........\e\e\rAssemble everyone in the factory.\f
In the factory...\e\rYes, sir!\f
Blast!\f
All right!\e\rWe've shut down the enemy lab!\f

Excellent work, in spite of the\rdifficult conditions.\fWith these plans, \ewe should be able to\rdevelop neotanks of our own.\fI think we'll have more intel on\rthem by the time you deploy them.\fAnyway, \econgratulations!\e\rThis was a great victory.\f
Sami's intel really helped a lot!\f
I just wish I could've done more.\f
The two of you really make a\rgreat team.\fLet's head for home and celebrate!\f
Wahoo! \eLet's have a BBQ!\f
Oh, no...\e\e\rI got beaten...\f

Even if we had just let the enemy\rbe, \ethey would've retreated.\fSo it's hard to call this a loss\rfor Orange Star. \eStill...\fWe were so close to getting those\rweapon plans.\fI think we should rethink our strategy\rand try this battle again!\fIn Fog of War, \ethe order of\radvancement is very important.\fIf you don't increase your vision\rrange, \eeven strong units are useless.\fThat's why it's so important to\rconfirm the location of enemy units\fby using recon units and by sending\rinfantry into the mountains.\fThat's what it takes to win in\rFog of War!\fIt's tough, \ebut I'm certain\ryou can do it!\f
I can't wait to try\rout a neotank!
They've come at last...\e\rI'll win it all with this factory.\f
You look like you're having a rough\rtime, Flak.\f
Huh?\e What rock did you crawl out\rfrom under, Adder?\f
Heh heh heh... \e\eI wanted to see the\rmilitary strength of this world myself.\f
Should you be here? \fI thought you were supposed to be\rinvading Yellow Comet?\f
Leave off, Flak. \eYou'd do well not\rto waste your energy on my affairs.\fLook! \eThe natives are knocking on\ryour doorstep...\eand they look restless.\f
Grrr...\e\rI won't lose.\f
"Won't"? \eHeh heh heh...\fYou mustn't lose, Flak. \eThat's\rcloser to the truth.\f
I'm looking forward to your\rperformance. \eHeh heh heh...\f
Whoa!\e\e\rWhat in the world is that?!?\f
It seems to be some sort of an\rinstallation.\fWhat are they planning now?\f
I believe they call it a factory.\fThis is the center of all the damage\rinflicted upon our forces.\f
So there's no doubt that it's the\rkey to the entire Black Hole invasion!\f

Yes, but...\e\rThere's still so much we don't know.\fI've got a spy on the inside,\e\rso I'll let you know if I hear anything.\fIn the meanwhile, \elet's launch some\rsorties and see the enemy's response.\f
Yes, ma'am!\f
That unit's ready, right?\e\rOpen the factory gate!\f
Yes, sir.\f
That's no base, \eand yet an enemy unit\rjust came out of it. \eWhat's going on?\f
So that's it...\e\rI understand!\f
What is it, Nell?\e\rIs everything OK?\f

No, it isn't, Max. \eOur army's not the\ronly thing being attacked here.\fThe enemy's been stealing weapons,\rmoney, and other materials, too!\fSomehow, they transport everything\rhere to this factory, then it all\fgoes into that pipe and winds\rup...\esomewhere else.\f
Black Hole goons... \eThey're even more\rdangerous than we originally thought.\f
Don't worry! \e\eAs long as we're in this\rtogether, there's no way we can lose!\f
You're right, Andy.\fYou've all made it this far.\e\rI know you'll emerge victorious.\f
I've got new intel, troops.\fI don't know what that factory's made\rof, \ebut I do know that we can't\fdamage it with the weapons we\e\rhave here.\f
Are you serious?\e Well then, how\rare we gonna put it out of business?\f
That's the problem at hand.\fThat long pipe is also made of the\rsame impervious substance.\fBut\e take a look over there.\f
It looks like two separate pieces of\rpipe are connected there...\f
Right. \eThe two pieces appear to be\rbolted together.\f
Maybe Md tanks or bombers could\rblast that seam apart...\f

Yes, \eand maybe by breaking the pipe,\rwe can halt their troop production.\fFirst, we should gain control of that\rairport in the center of the map.\fThat should give us an advantage.\fNext, we need to make good use of\ryour CO Powers...\fJust so you know, your Power Meter\rfills faster when you're attacked.\fIt does build up for the attacker, too,\e\rso firing first is never a mistake!\f
OK!\e Now that that's clear, I'm using\rmy CO Power as often as I can!\f
Lord Flak, \e\eit appears that the foe\rhas discovered the pipe's weak point.\f

Grrr...\e\e That section may be weak,\e\rbut it's still not easy to destroy.\fEven so, \eif they manage to damage\rthe pipe and halt troop production,\fwe're in deep trouble.\fHit 'em now, \ebefore they're ready!\e\rSmash 'em!\f
Yes, sir!\f
We did it!\fThere'll be no more units\rcoming from that factory!\f
Aarrrgh!\e\e\rNooooooo!\f
Give it up, Flak!\e\rYou lose!\f
My invasion of Orange Star may\rhave failed, but I'm not alone.\fThere are other Black Hole COs,\e\rwith more armies.\f
What are you saying? \eAre Yellow\rComet and Blue Moon under attack?\f
Hah! \eYou'll find out soon enough.\fThey'll be coming for you next!\e\rI'm gone.\f
Hey! \eWe're not done with you!\e\e\r...\eHe got away again!\fWe can't ignore his warning, can we?\e\rWe've gotta contact the other armies.\f

Yes. \eYou're right.\e\rLet's ready reinforcements.\fIn truth, though, \eour own Orange Star\rArmy is in pretty ragged shape.\fIf that battle had gone on much\rlonger, materials and morale might\fhave dropped to dangerous levels.\fI can't tell you how grateful I am\rfor all of your aid!\e Nice work!\f
It's all due to your instruction, Nell.\f
No,\e it was all of you.\e You made the\rdecisions and performed the deeds.\f
C'mon! \eLet's hurry and check on\rthe other countries!\f
Yeah! \eLet's get busy and drive those\rBlack Hole thugs off the planet!\f
You said it! \fWe'll knock the stuffing out of 'em,\rthen head home for a victory feast!\f

I knew the enemy wasn't going to roll\rover and let us win, but still...\fListen! \eWe've made it this far,\e\rand I'm confident that you can win!\fMaybe your first target should be the\rairport...\fBombers would make targeting that\rpipe seam much easier.\fTests of power are Max's forte,\e\rwhile Sami's the best at capturing.\fOf course, Andy's strong overall and\rhas those amazing repair skills.\fDon't forget, trying different COs\ris a vital piece of strategy, too.\fGood luck, everyone!\f
Wahoo!\rI beat the bad guys!
Whew... I wonder how\rour allies are doing.\r
Take that!\rOrange Star is free!!!
Hey, Sami! \eNell said you\rneeded to see us!\f
Ah, Andy! \eMax!\e\e\rThanks for coming so quickly.\fYou're not going to believe this,\e\rbut the Black Hole Army's back!\f
You've got to be kidding!\fDidn't they learn their lesson\rthe last time?\f
I guess not... \eLet's go get 'em!\e\e\rUm...\e Where are they?\f
Slow down, Andy.\e\rThe enemy's not here in Cosmo Land.\f
Huh?\e\e\rWell, where are they?\f
In our world... \eIn Wars World,\e\rthere are several continents, right?\f
Really? \eContinents?\f
You twerp! \eYou don't know\ranything, do you?\f
Heeeey... \eYou're not...\ecalling me\rdumb, are you?\f
I'm just saying that people who don't\rknow anything...\edon't know nothin'!\f

Knock it off, you two! \eThis is neither\rthe time nor the place for that!\fAccording to Nell, Macro Land is the\rfocus of the conflict, but\fthey've been spotted in other countries,\rtoo! \eIncluding here in Orange Star!\f
And Blue Moon \eand Yellow Comet?\f
Yep! \eAnd Green Earth, as well.\fI wonder if they're mobilizing to\rpush the Black Hole Army back, too.\f
Woohoo!!!\e\e\rIt'll be like a family reunion!\f
Andy! \eThis is war! \e\eDo you think\rthat's anything to be excited about?\f
No, but...\ewe'll get to see everyone\ragain, and that makes me happy!\fC'mon, \elet's go!\f
Hold on, Andy. \eAndy?\e\e\rHe's gone... \eOh...\f
Well, we all gotta go sometime, right?\fAt least he's got the right attitude.\fNo sense getting all bummed out\rbefore the battle even begins.\f

You know...\e It's been so peaceful\raround here lately...\fI just know Nell is going to want\rto give us all a little refresher\fcourse on basic combat ops.\fBut that's fine...\e After all, you\rcan never have too much training!\f
Oh, great.\e\e Just what I wanted...\rAnother boring lecture.\f
Commander, \eenemy troops have been\rspotted on the far side of the river.\f
Are you sure?!?\e\e\rHere? In this rural area?\f
What are your orders, ma'am?\e\e\rShould we cease ops and attack?\f
That's affirmative, soldier.\fWe can't allow the enemy a foothold\rthis deep in Orange Star territory.\f
Good assessment, Sami!\fThat's the tactical sense I expect\rfrom a special-forces commander!\f
Nell!\e\e\rWhat are you doing here?\f
Tracking down the CO who's\rinvading Orange Star, of course!\fSami, \ecan I trust you to take\rcare of this situation?\f
Yes, ma'am!\e\e\rI won't let you down!\f
Lord Flak! \e\eOrange Star forces\rsighted on the opposite shore...\f
What?!?\e\e\rIs that all they got!? \eHah!\fSend out the tanks!\e\e\rWe'll crush 'em!\f
Grrr...\e\e\rNot bad...\efor a girl.\f
You're the Black Hole CO, right?\fWho do you think you are?\e\e\rWhat're you doing in--?\f
Yap, yap, yap! \eShut your trap!\fI'm leaving \efor now...\e\e\rNext time, \eI'll put you in your place.\f
Hey!\f
He's escaped...\e\e\rAnd he was so rude, too!\f
Oooh!!\e\e\rThat makes me so angry!\fIf I get the chance, I'm gonna\rrun him down!\f
I'm glad we can count on you, Sami.\f
That big thug! He won't\rget away next time!

How disappointing.\e\rYou were defeated.\fLet me give you some advice.\e\rUse the cities on the left to ambush\fyour foes and halt their advance.\fIt's vital to have your indirect attack\runits lay down cover fire and\fto use the cities below to rest\ryour troops and let them recover.\fThis Fog of War limits your visual\rrange, so exercise caution when\fdeploying.\fDon't forget, your infantry can\rcross rivers! That's important.\f
Understood... \eMy apologies, ma'am.\f
Sami, \eI know you won't make the same\rmistake twice. \eYou'll win next time!\f
Hey!\eOrange Star dogs!\e\e\rCan you hear me?\f
Um... Lord Flak...\e\rThe microphone?\f
Shut up!\e\e\rToo complicated.\fAnyone there?\e\e\rOr are you too scared to face me?!?\f
What's with the racket?\e\e\rYou lonely or something?\f
Hah! \eLook! A gorilla!\f
What did you say?!?\fIf anyone here's a gorilla,\e\rit's you, ape-man!\f
I'm no ape!\e\e\rI'm Flak!!!\f
Flak? \e\eWhat's that?\e\rSome sort of code name?\fListen up, Flak.\e\rMy name's Max.\fNow tell me what you jerks are doin'\rrampaging through our country?\f
YOUR country?\fOrange Star belongs to the Black\rHole Army now!\fYou complain, you get hurt!\f
You think so?!?\e\e\rGive it your best shot!\f
Max! \eCalm down.\f
Nell?!?\f
To lose your head is to lose the fight.\e\e\rI taught you that, remember?\f
Yes, \ebut...I...\e\e\rIt's just...\f
I understand your anger, Max.\e No one\rlikes seeing his homeland ravaged.\fAll the more reason to proceed calmly\rand rationally.\fUse your head, \eand drive these\rfiends from our borders! \eOK?\f
You got it! \eLet's roll!\f
How's that, ape-man?!?\e\e\rTold you not to mess with me!\f
...\eHah!\f
Hah? \eDon't hah me!\e\e\rYou just got beaten!\f
This was just a test.\e\e\rNext time is for real.\f
Like I've never heard that before!\fI'm gonna make you regret ever\rshowing your ugly mug around here!\f
Max, or whatever you said your\rname was, \eyou're mine!\fBefore this is over, \eI'll crush\ryou like a bug. \e\eSo long.\f
Wait! \eWait, you dirtbag!\e\e\rShoot! \eHe got away!\f
Flak, huh? Dumb\rname, tough CO.
NO! \eI lost...\e\e\rI'm sorry, everyone...\f

Cheer up, Max. \e\eYou'll just have to do\rbetter next time.\fThat laser's the problem, isn't it?\r\eYou have to control the port or\fcity next to it and destroy it ASAP.\fStopping the enemy around the bridge\rabove the laser would probably be\freasonably sound tactics.\fOf course, you could always use a\rlander unit to ferry troops over\fand capture the enemy HQ, too.\r\eIt IS unguarded, after all.\f
What a disgrace...\e\rI won't lose again! \eI promise, Nell!\f
That's the spirit, Max!\e\rGood luck!\f
Pardon me, ma'am,\e\rCommander Andy's arrived.\f
Thank you.\e\e\rSend him in.\f
Nell,\e\rhow're things looking?\f
That's what concerns me...\e\rDo you see that giant cannon?\f
Wow! \eIt's huge!\e\rI've never seen anything like it!\f
A cannon that size is a first\rfor me, too.\fThe Black Hole Army... \eIt's a bigger\rthreat than it was last time we fought.\f
You got that right!\e\e\rNell, \elet me take care of this.\f
Max?\e\rWhat are you doing here?\f
C'mon, Nell. \eThis job's too much\rfor Andy.\fYou need someone with my strength\rto take out that cannon.\f
Hey! \eI can do this!\f
Knock it off, Andy.\e\e\rWar isn't a game.\fYou'll just get hurt.\f
Max,\e\rI have faith in Andy.\fHe might not be as powerful as you,\e\rbut he can do things no one else can.\fI think this will be a good experience\rfor him, so let's let him handle this.\f
Hmph! \eDon't come cryin' to me if he\rgets hurt!\fYo, Andy!\e\rYou sure you're up for this?\f
You know it!\e\e\rSit back and watch, Max!\f
Flak, \ethe Black Cannon's up and\rready to go.\f
Got it. \eThanks, Lash.\e\e\rNow I'll smash 'em good!\f
Don't forget, you promised to be a\rguinea pig in my next experiment!\f
Hmmm...\e\rYeah, I remember.\f
Well, I'm off! \eToodles!\e\e\rHave fun!\fOh, yeah! \eAlmost forgot, \e\eHawke said\rto hurry and conquer Orange Star!\f
Hawke said...\fCrush. \eSo I'm gonna crush 'em here.\e\e\rNo mistakes... \eI'll crush 'em all...\f
Commander! \eWe discovered this in\ra city we captured.\f
Huh? \eWhat's this?\fIt looks like a map to a lab...\e\e\rIs this lab hidden in some city?\f
I do recall that Commander Sami was\rdiscussing plans to attack a lab.\f
Oh, \eI did hear something about that!\e\e\rSome new Black Hole weapon thingy...\fAnd that there might be hints to it\rhidden in our neighboring countries.\f
That's correct. \eShall I deploy some\rinfantry to follow up?\f
No... \eJust send her the intel!\e\e\rSami can take things from there.\fIf we don't take care of business\rhere, we'll never live it down!\f
Understood!\e\rWe'll proceed as ordered, sir!\f
Good! \e\eLet's show those creeps who\rthey're messing with!\f
Wahoo!\e\e\rI won! I won!\f
Grrr!\e\e\rNow you've done it, runt!\f
I'm no runt!\e\rI'm Andy!\f
NAME?\e I didn't ask for your name!\fArgh! \eI can't lose anymore! \eI can't!\fSound the retreat! \e\eHead back to\rbase and regroup!\f
As long as I'm here,\e\ryou'll never get through!\f
Yo, Andy...\e\rYou OK?\f
Max! \eHow was I?\e\rDid you watch the whole thing?\f
Yeah...\eI watched.\e\e\rThat was a little close.\f
Hey! \eThose tanks back there...\e\e\rAre those your troops, Max?\f
Hm? \eOh, um...\ethose are...\f
Commander Max! \eWe received your\rorders and moved out at once!\f
Well, no one ordered you to broadcast\rit to the entire world, soldier!\f
Hmmm...\f
What?!?\fIt's a training exercise!\e\e Gotta check\rthose engines every now and then!\fGeez... \eC'mon, boys. \eLet's go home.\f
You know, Nell, \eI'm really glad to have\rMax on our side!\f
So am I, Andy. \eSo am I.\f
I did it!!!\rDid you see that?!?
It's too bad, Andy,\e but\ryou were beaten this time.\f
Ahh... \eLet me try again! \eRight now!\f

Calm down. \e\eI've got some advice for\ryou, \eand I want you to listen.\fIt's tough facing both the Black\rCannon and the mini-cannons, too.\fHowever, \efocusing only on the\rmini-cannon in front of you\fexposes you to attack.\fOne tactic is to send quick units\rbetween the mini-cannons to\fsuppress and capture the factory.\fBut first, you need to shut down\renemy deployment capabilites.\fGood luck, Andy. \e\eGet out there and\rshow Max what you can do!\f
Mistress Lash, \ewe have reports that\rOrange Star is closing on our position.\f
Hmmm...\f
What would you like us to do?\f
Just go and \eengage them or something.\f
Engage them...\eor something?\f
Uh, yeah. \e\eI'm a little busy researching\rmy latest invention right now. \eDuh!\fOnce this is finished, \eI'll bathe\rall of Orange Star in a sea of fire...\fOooh! \eI love new toys!\f
Um...\e That is... \e\eI'm not\e\rsure we can do this on our own.\f
Ah! \eYou're hopeless! \e\e\rFine! Let's get this over with!\f
The Black Hole HQ is located in those\rmountains, isn't it?\f
That's correct. \e\eIt seems that Lash is\rworking on another destructive device.\f
So, \ewe need to launch an assault,\rcapture their HQ, and shut her down.\fIf all goes well, we might get some\rintel on Black Hole's forces, too.\f
Being able to move in the mountains\e\ris key to making this work.\f
Which is why you chose me for this\rmission.\e I understand.\f
We have reports of Black Cannons\rand missile silos in the mountains, too.\fThis isn't going to be a walk\rin the park, Sami. \e\eBe careful!\f
I will. \eYou can count on me!\f
Pfeh! \eNo big deal. \e\eIt's not like this\ris our only hidden base!\fToodles! Hee hee hee...\f
Anything to report, Sami?\f
No sign of any of Lash's files yet.\f
Oh...\f
They're thorough, I'll give them that.\fHardly any time to evacuate,\e but they\rstill managed to destroy her notes.\f
Well, \e\eI'm sure we'll have more chances\rto gather intel in the future.\fWe captured an enemy HQ today,\e\rand that's good work.\f
You're right. \eThere's still a lot of\rground to cover...\fWe need to move ahead base by base\e\rand ensure that we take 'em all!\f
This is just the\rbeginning!
Sami! \eAre you OK?\f
I'm sorry, Nell.\e\e\rYou believed in me, \eand I let you down.\f

Yes, I believed in you. \e\eAnd I\rstill do. \eYou can do this, Sami.\fUp and at 'em, soldier.\e\e\rWe've got some planning to do!\fFirst and foremost, we need to take\rthose factories at the top of the map.\f
Yes, I agree.\fDeploying rocket units here would make\rtaking out the Black Cannons easier.\f

Missile silos are useless against\rthe Black Cannons, \eso just\fignore them.\fMountains impede vehicle movement,\e\rso utilizing your superior infantry\funits is your best strategy.\fGet your troops over those mountains,\e\e\rand hit 'em hard! \eGood luck, Sami!\f
Commander, \ewe've received a letter\rfrom the enemy.\f
Addressed to me?\e\e\rI wonder what it says...\f
Sir?\e\e\rWhat does it say?\f
It's a challenge.\fIt says, "If you're not a coward, you'll\rcome to the coordinates on this map."\f
What are your orders, sir?\f
We're moving out, of course!\fYou think I'm scared of Black Hole?\e\rNot a chance!\f
So, \ethis is the place...\f
That it is, \eAndy.\f
Hey! \eWho are you supposed to be?\f
I am Hawke.\e\e\rA Black Hole CO.\f
Why did you send that letter\rto me?\f
I wanted to meet you.\e\e\rTo challenge you...man-to-man.\f
What, you wanna fight?\f

That's right. \e\eI hoped you'd show me\ryour tactical prowess.\fI gather you have immense potential.\e\rUnpolished, but great nonetheless.\fI require a skilled foe. \ePerhaps you\rwould be an appropriate enemy.\fPlus, \eno one else has been able\rto contain your...\eyouthful energy.\f
What are you talking about?!?\fI have no clue who you are!\f
Meet me in combat, boy,\e and\ryou will learn all you need.\fWell, \ewhat will it be?\e\e\rWill you accept my challenge?\f
If you're selling, \ethen I'm buying!\f
Just what I expected to hear.\fHere are the rules: \eWe use only\rair and naval units.\fThe first to lose every unit...\e\rloses the battle.\f
And if I win?\f
Then I will return this area to the\rcontrol of Orange Star.\f
OK! \e\eThen if I lose, \eI'll let Black Hole\rtake possession of this land.\f
Quite generous...\econsidering that we\ralready have control of this region.\fIt is done! \e\eLet it begin, Andy!\f
Here I come!\f
How was THAT, Hawke?!?\f
Hm... \eQuite impressive, Andy.\e\e\rVictory is yours.\f
Now, like you promised,\e\rpack up and get out!\f
It seems I've no choice.\e\e\rAll units, \ewithdraw!\f
Commander, \ethe Black Hole forces\rare retreating!\f
Yeah! \eWe did it!\fI've gotta tell Nell.\e\e\rPut me in touch with her right away!\f
Yes, sir!\f
Andy?\e\rWhat in the world are you doing?\f
Nell, \elisten to this.\fI beat this guy named Hawke and\rdrove his troops out of...\f
I don't have time for that!\fOrange Star is under attack!\e\rThe enemy is here in massive numbers!\f
What?!?\f
They've advanced beyond the front\ryou were supposed to be holding!\f
Uh, \ethat means...\f
You fell right into their trap, Andy!\e\e\rGet back here on the double!\f
But...\ebut... \eWhat about...\f
If the continent falls, \ethose islands\rmean nothing!!!\f
Hmmm...\f
Commander... \eCommander!\e\rAwaiting your orders, sir!\f
Back to the mainland! \eNOW!!!\e\e\rDrat! \eDouble drat!!!\f
That creep!\e Next time I\rsee him, \ehe's in trouble!\f
I lost?\f
Ha ha ha... \eI came looking for an\ropponent, \ebut all I found was a child.\fI'll hold you to your word, boy.\e\rThis land is ours!\f
Wai...\ewait!\f

What? \eBegging for mercy?\e Or do\ryou think to challenge me again?\fYou? \eA child who doesn't know how to\rgather intel \eor field an army!\fI beat you once, boy. \eAre you coming\rback for more?\f
Yes... \eYes, I am!\e\rI can't let it end like this!\fHawke! \eThis time, I challenge you!\e\rFight me!\f
Ha ha ha... \eWhy not?\e\e\rI'm ready when you are.\f
What have you done with the Orange\rStar soldiers we captured?\f
They've been taken to HQ, as per\ryour orders, sir.\f

C'mon in!\fWelcome to Battle Maps! My name's\rHachi. Pleased to meet you!\fThis is where you use points earned\rin Campaign mode or the War Room.\fI've got maps and COs you can use\rin Free Battle or the War Room, and...\fWell, I've got all kinds of stuff! \rGo ahead, take a look around!\f
Back again?\fWhat can I do for you?\f
I'm outta everything.\rMy shelves are bare.\fIt's a sign of my consummate\rsalesmanship.\f
Came back, eh? Well, I've\rgot everything you need.\f
Well, now! You're back again!\fMust mean you made some money\rin Campaign mode or the War Room.\fWhat'll it be today?\f
Hey there, soldier!\fDon't like what you see? Finish more\rof the campaign, and try again.\fWell, do you need anything today?\f
Look who's here!\fHey, listen. Even if you buy all the\rmaps I have in stock, come back again.\fI'm always getting new supplies.\fGo ahead and take a look at\rwhat came in today.\f

Come on in!\fHey, have you cleared\rCampaign mode?\fThere's more to it than\rjust clearing it once, you know.\fRumor has it that there's\ranother, harder campaign...\fAh, but I'm talking too much!\rAre you going to buy anything today?\f

Hey! If you're coming in,\rcome in! And shut the door!\fBy the way, which CO have you\rbeen using?\fUsing the same CO over and\rover isn't very impressive.\fIf you want to earn a higher score,\ryou should try someone new.\fEnough of that; what'll\rit be today?\f

Well, back again, are you?\fSay, have you tried\rthe Hard Campaign?\fAll you need to do is\rpress SELECT before\fyou start the Campaign Mode.\fThe Hard Campaign is just\rthe challenge you need, soldier!\fIt'll toughen you up, and the\rpayoff is bigger, too!\fIf you're ever short of funds,\rgive the Hard Campaign a shot.\fSo, go make some cash, and\rspend it all here! Heh heh heh!\f

Hey, it's my favorite soldier!\fSay, are you making the best use\rof your CO Powers?\fYou're not ignoring normal powers\rin favor of super powers, are you?\fIn some situations, normal powers\rare better than super ones!\fAny energy left after you use a\rnormal power doesn't just disappear.\fDidn't you notice that?\fOh yeah, but you don't build up any\renergy when you're using CO Powers.\fLife ain't that easy, soldier!\fOops! You know, my mouth's gonna get\rme in hot water one of these days!\fEnough of this chitchat. Are you\rbuying something, or what?\f

C'mon in!\fTell me, have you ever been in\ra battle with Jess?\fShe and Eagle are always squabbling,\rbut that shows how close they are!\fLet me tell you, that gal's the real\rdeal. Gives me goose bumps!\fShe's a bit like Max in ability, but\rthere's nothing second-rate about\fher long-range units. And her air\rand naval units?\fWell, they might not be the best, but\rshe doesn't make many mistakes.\fHer CO Power is a little plain. After\rall, supplying units isn't that glamorous.\fBut it resupplies air and naval units,\rtoo! She is amazing, isn't she?\fThere I go, rattling on like an old fool!\rLet's get down to business!\f

Well now, look what the\rcat dragged in !\fAre you familiar with Sensei?\fHe's a bit long in the tooth now,\rbut in his day, he was something else!\fHe sure taught me a thing or two...\rAh, now I'm getting all misty!\fAnyway, Kanbei and I owe most of\rour success to that old man.\fYou're not impressed with his CO\rPower, right? If you think increasing\fthe number of mech and infantry units\ris something to sneeze at,\fthen you're still wet behind the ears!\fYou've got to consider WHY he makes\rthose 9 HP units land!\fThat's enough chitchat!\rGet to buying!\f

Mopping 'em up out there?\fI'm happy to see Nell in such\rfine spirits lately.\fAnd the youngsters! Sami and\rAndy are both growing so fast!.\fI think our country's safe with\rthis new generation on guard...\fOh, listen to this old fool prattle on!\rLet's talk business!\f

Oh, it's you, again!\fHave you met the new kid,\rColin?\fHe's Blue Moon's little rich boy,\rbut his talent is undeniable.\fHis special power? Whew...\fIf you use the Power of Money right,\rit'll give you the strength to topple\feven Sturm with ease.\rDid you know that?\fHis normal firepower is low, so it's\ra question of overwhelming opponents\fwith sheer numbers or saving cash for\rCO Powers. Tough strategic choice!\fEnough with the small talk!\rWhy don't you have a look around?\f

Good to see you again!\fHave you ever faced Flak, that\rbig ape with the Black Hole Army?\fHis attacks are so haphazard. Power\rmeans zip if you can't hit the target!\fI bet he'd be a difficult CO to use\rin the War Room.\fSo, are you ready to talk business?\rI'm all out of gossip for now!\f

Hey! Quite the military posture\ryou're getting there!\fHave you met Lash yet? Yep, she's\rthat girl with the hair out to there!\fI hear she's the one who designed\rBlack Hole's new cannon and laser!\fWhat a waste of talent!\fIf she's gotta make stuff, why can't\rshe make a pool for my house!?\fWhat's that got to do with me, right?\rLet's get some business done!\f

You've heard of Adder, right?\fHe's not much for offense, and he\rdoesn't have any specialty troops.\fThe thing is, he's got no weak points,\reither! That's the trouble right there!\fPlus, he stores up energy for his CO\rPower like there's no tomorrow!\fBut if he uses it over and over\ragain, it takes longer to build up.\fHow's that for some juicy intel?\fShow me some gratitude and\rwhip out your wallet!\f

Tell me, have you ever seen Hawke?\rHe's a CO in the Black Hole Army.\fHe's one bad hombre, and no fooling.\rHe's leagues above most other COs.\fAren't many who've gone head-to-\rhead with him and walked away\fa winner, you know? Of course,\rI'd teach him some manners, but...\fAh, why don't I just shut my yap\rand let you do some shopping, eh?\f
